title: Commons
description: Commons provides a collaborative workspace for sharing cohort definitions, concept sets, analysis specifications, and study artifacts across teams and institutions. It integrates with ABBY AI to surface relevant shared resources and streamline cross-organizational research collaboration.
tips: Search Commons before creating new cohort definitions or concept sets to avoid duplicating work already validated by other teams.
Tag shared artifacts with relevant therapeutic area and study type metadata to improve discoverability for collaborators.
Use Commons integration with ABBY AI to receive recommendations on existing shared resources that match your current research context.
Review the provenance and version history of shared artifacts before incorporating them into a new study.
Contribute validated study packages back to Commons to support the broader research community.
